title: 猛特訓！オムレツマスターを狙え！

text_block_list.text: All right! Watch and learn! HYAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Whew! And that's how you make it nice and fluffy!
Now, when you yell, it's important to—

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Um, is the screaming really necessary?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Of course it is! Everything requires passion!
C'mon, City! Use that diaphragm and let it really
rip!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Omelet training! City's gonna be on a cooking
show!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
As soon as I told Bamboo about it, she insisted on
helping me.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well, I was fired up! And who wouldn't be after
hearing why you agreed to the show even though
you can't cook?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: H-hey! There's no need to go into details!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Watching you trying your best at modeling and
racing all the time is what inspires your fans. I
know you don't want to let them down!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
You agreed to go on the show just so they could
see you trying your best at something that's hard
for you!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well, the support of my fans is what motivates
me. I can't always be on the receiving end.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ooooh! What heat! What fiery passion! City, your
heart is like a furnace, and I'm gonna do all I can
to help you keep it burning!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
What am I still standing here for?! I'll be back in a
sec, so don't you move!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Thanks for waiting!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, not again... Don't tell me you—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I did some quick waterfall training to
power myself up to support you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Now, behold my newly evolved omelet-making
skills!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hryaaah!
choice_data_list:
(She threw the eggs and the frying pan in the
air!)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Don't you blink, now! Here comes the great,
never-ending... OMELET INFINITY!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: RAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Order up!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
City! I hereby bestow this cooking technique to
you!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Where do I even start with this?
choice_data_list:
Maybe the lesson is, uh, the importance of not
giving up?
The power of endless possibility! Infinityyyyy!
The power of endless possibility! Infinityyyyy!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Where do I even start with this?
choice_data_list:
Maybe the lesson is, uh, the importance of not
giving up?
The power of endless possibility! Infinityyyyy!
The power of endless possibility! Infinityyyyy!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Ah... I guess I can buy that. I just have to keep
trying until I can do it.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
And I'll be here at your side! ...And don't you go
anywhere either, Trainer! I'm gonna need a taste
tester!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I stick around for Bamboo Memory's rather intense cooking lesson as she tasks me with tasting each omelet... and washing the dishes... and getting more eggs.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Not you too... You're on board with this?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo! Things're heatin' up now! I can almost
smell the burning passion in the—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh craaap! I left the burner on!
